name: Zaphyr
description: Fairies are very scary when they are 6 feet tall. Fairies have existed for much longer than humans but they went unnoticed by their small size and few ambitions, they didn't change much the scenery they went through, they lived among flowers or leaves, there were so many of them, countless. Small as fireflies, they spoke at a frequency that would be almost impossible for a human to understand, so they had no mercy in destroying the forest where these creatures lived, after all what is small is always trampled on. So the only solution was to get big, but this spell had a very expensive price, for a fairy to be the size of a human she should live as one, the fairy who chose this fate would never be able to listen to her loved ones again, and would die at the age of 80, That would be for a fairy to condemn herself to live only a few more months, that would be too cruel, but there was one, someone capable of sacrificing his place in the world for the sake of his race, him alone for all
creator: Xadrez
